step2_desc: File complaint with the concerned regulatory body (ROC
if_serious: Approach appropriate legal authority or court.

keyword: warranty claim rejected unfairly causing financial and mental stress|warranty claim rejected unfairly
case_understanding: Warranty claim was unfairly rejected by company causing financial loss and mental stress.
important_rule: Manufacturer/seller must honor valid warranty claims.
what_is_illegal: Unfairly rejecting warranty claim is an unfair trade practice.
step3_desc: Raise complaint in writing with all documents.
step4_desc: Approach consumer helpline or grievance cell.
column16: High financial loss or repeated issue

keyword: contract terms violated after signing seeking legal resolution|contract terms violated after signing
case_understanding: Other party violated contract terms after signing the agreement.
what_is_illegal: contract terms are legally binding and must be followed.
step1_title: Violating contract terms is illegal and breach of contract.
step2_title: Keep signed contract and evidence of violation.
when_serious: File civil suit for breach of contract.

keyword: payment not made after contract completion seeking legal resolution|payment not made after contract completion
case_understanding: Payment not received after completing work/service as per contract.
important_rule: Payment must be made as per agreed contract terms.
what_is_illegal: Non-payment after work completion is breach of contract.
if_serious: File suit for recovery of money.

keyword: tenant forced to vacate property without notice seeking legal resolution|tenant forced to vacate property without notice|forced eviction|illegal eviction
case_understanding: Tenant was forced to vacate property without proper legal notice.
relevant_laws: Rent Control Act|Transfer of Property Act
important_rule: Proper notice period is mandatory before eviction.
what_is_illegal: Forcing tenant to vacate without notice is illegal.
step1_desc: Verify notice clause in rent agreement.
step4_desc: Approach Rent Control Authority or court.

keyword: forged property documents detected seeking legal resolution|property fraud|forged documents|fake property papers|forged property documents detected
case_understanding: Forged or fake property documents detected.
important_rule: Ownership documents must be genuine and authentic.
what_is_illegal: Forgery of property documents is a serious criminal offence.
step1_desc: Keep all original and suspected forged documents.
step2_desc: Check with sub-registrar office or revenue records.
step3_desc: File FIR with police for forgery and cheating.
step4_desc: Approach civil court for declaration and injunction.

keyword: college denied admission without valid reason causing financial and mental stress|admission denied|college admission rejected|unfair admission|seat denied|college denied admission without valid reason
case_understanding: College denied admission without any valid reason causing financial loss and mental stress.
relevant_laws: Education Laws|University Grants Commission guidelines|State Education Acts
step1_title: Denying admission without valid reason is arbitrary and illegal.
step3_title: Approach higher education department or university.
step4_title: File complaint with Education Department or Consumer Forum.

keyword: contract terms violated after signing and no action taken by authorities|contract terms violated after signing

important_rule: Contract once signed must be honored by both parties.
what_is_illegal: Violation of contract and inaction by authorities is against rule of law.

keyword: domestic conflict requiring legal guidance causing financial and mental stress|domestic issue|family dispute|domestic conflict requiring legal guidance

keyword: salary delay|delayed salary|salary not paid|unpaid salary|pf not deposited|provident fund issue|epf not credited|pf not given
case_understanding: Employer is delaying salary payment and not depositing provident fund (EPF).
relevant_laws: Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act 1952|Payment of Wages Act 1936|Code on Wages 2019
important_rule: Employer must pay salary on time and deposit EPF contributions regularly as per law.
what_is_illegal: Non-payment of salary and failure to deposit PF is illegal and punishable.
step1_desc: Keep salary slips bank statements and PF account details.
step2_desc: Raised issue with HR or employer and ask for clarification.
step3_desc: Submit complaint on EPFO portal or labour department.
step4_desc: Approach labour court or file formal complaint.
when_serious: Salary delayed for months or PF missing for long period
if_serious: Consult labour lawyer and file official case immediately.
